topStories.title: Iran vows to make Trump pay for ‘grave miscalculation’ if US escalates war
topStories.description: Ali Larijani responds to US threat to hit Iran's power infrastructure, saying the 'whole region will go dark'.

topStories.title: LDF’s development narrative in Kollam constituency will face a stiff challenge from UDF
topStories.description: While the constituency has traditionally leaned towards the left, the Congress sprang a major surprise by winning Kollam Corporation in the recent local body elections. The BJP too has steadily raised its vote share

dailyNews.title: US Refueling Aircraft Crashes In Iraq Amid Iran War
dailyNews.description: An American KC-135 aerial refueling aircraft crashed in western Iraq while a second plane involved in the incident landed safely, the US military said Thursday.

dailyNews.title: Iran Threatens To "Set Region's Oil, Gas On Fire", Warns US Will Regret
dailyNews.description: Iran vowed Thursday to make the United States regret attacking the Islamic republic and said it would keep up a chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz that has sent oil prices soaring.

dailyNews.title: US military announces rescue effort after fueling aircraft crashes in Iraq
dailyNews.description: No deaths have been reported so far, but the military said the crash involved two aircraft, one of which landed safely.

dailyNews.title: 1 Killed, 2 Injured After Shooting At US' Old Dominion University
dailyNews.description: The suspect who killed one person and injured two others at Old Dominion University on Thursday has been identified by authorities as Mohamed Bailor Jalloh.

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu says Israel ‘stronger than ever’ in first speech since Iran war
dailyNews.description: Prime minister says US-Israeli war prevented Iran from moving its nuclear and ballistic projects underground.

dailyNews.title: Fuel shortages bring queues, protests around the world
dailyNews.description: Rising fuel prices have caused long queues and protests around the world as the US-Israeli war on Iran rages.

dailyNews.title: Advocates push for major probe as US boat strikes in Latin America kill 157
dailyNews.description: The Inter-American Commission on Human Rights is set to hold first hearing on US's alleged extrajudicial killings.

dailyNews.title: How will the war on Iran impact the US economy?
dailyNews.description: Outcomes depend on how quickly oil tankers can return to the Strait of Hormuz, experts said.

dailyNews.title: Does President Trump have an exit strategy for the war with Iran?
dailyNews.description: United States officials are issuing contradictory statements on the war's timeline and objectives.

dailyNews.title: NASA Says "On Track" For Artemis 2 Launch As Soon As April 1
dailyNews.description: NASA said Thursday that the long-delayed launch of the Artemis 2 mission, part of the US push to return to the Moon by 2028, could come as soon as April 1.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court verdict on OBC creamy layer a victory for social justice: T.N. CM Stalin
Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
dailyNews.description: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.

dailyNews.title: How oil is at the center of the US-Israel war with Iran
dailyNews.description: As oil prices rise, the US, Israel and Iran seem ready to keep fighting no matter the costs.

dailyNews.title: ICC drops the investigation into whether US sanctions on Venezuela count as crimes against humanity
dailyNews.description: The International Criminal Court has ended its review of whether US sanctions on Venezuela count as crimes against humanity, citing insufficient proof of intent, though sanctions may have worsened hardships

dailyNews.title: US Shooting: Car Crashes Into Synagogue In Michigan; Active Shooter Situation
dailyNews.description: Authorities respond to incident at Temple Israel in West Bloomfield as police increase security across nearby communities.

dailyNews.title: FBI reports ‘active shooter situation’ at Michigan synagogue in the US
dailyNews.description: Law enforcement officials have reported gunfire near the Temple Israel Synagogue in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan.

dailyNews.title: Trump Issues Big Statement After Iran Wishes To Withdraw From FIFA World Cup
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump's comments came just two days after he told FIFA chief Gianni Infantino the Iranian players would be welcome despite the Middle East war.

dailyNews.title: Transgender people, men having sex with men, sex workers cannot donate blood, Centre insists in Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: Public health perspective must trump individual rights, says Ministry, noting that the right of the recipient to receive a safe blood transfusion far outweighs the right of an individual to donate blood

topStories.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Trump administration considers waiving Jones Act; here's all you need to know about it
topStories.description: The Trump administration is considering a temporary waiver of the Jones Act to keep energy and agricultural shipments moving between US ports amid supply disruptions linked to the Iran conflict. The move aims to ease rising fuel prices by allowing foreign ships to transport goods domestically.

topStories.title: Trump says not ‘appropriate’ for Iran to participate in the World Cup in US
topStories.description: US president, who won the FIFA Peace Prize says Iran would be welcome but should not come for its players' safety.

topStories.title: 'Melania' documentary tops Amazon Prime movie charts after streaming debut
topStories.description: A controversial documentary about first lady Melania Trump debuted at the top spot on Amazon Prime's streaming site after its premiere Monday.

topStories.title: Trump warns of Iranian 'sleeper cells' as Canada is accused of harboring regime operatives
topStories.description: Canadian Conservatives slam Liberal government for allegedly allowing hundreds of Iranian regime officials to remain despite known security risks.

topStories.title: Trump says Iran’s World Cup participation may not be ‘appropriate,’ while adding men’s team is still ‘welcome’
topStories.description: President Donald Trump said Iran's national soccer team is "welcome" to play in the World Cup, but cautioned it might not be "appropriate" to compete amid the ongoing conflict.

dailyNews.description: By suing Republican states and making sharp reversals in old cases, the Trump administration is using courts to fast-track major shifts in policy.

dailyNews.title: Judge Dismisses Bulk of Lawsuit Over Trump’s Funding Freeze for Tunnel
dailyNews.description: The case is mostly moot, a federal judge said, because the administration has resumed the flow of more than $200 million in funding that it had temporarily stopped.

dailyNews.title: Senate Resoundingly Passes Housing Bill, but Challenges Lie Ahead
dailyNews.description: The lopsided vote to approve the measure was a rare bit of election-year bipartisanship on a major affordability issue, but G.O.P. disputes and President Trump’s disinterest have left its fate uncertain.

dailyNews.title: How Trump’s Election Lie Could Affect 2026 Midterms
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is putting the weight of the federal government behind his false claims about the 2020 election in order to investigate key swing states ahead of the midterms. Nick Corasaniti, a New York Times reporter focusing on elections, homes in on the states that have become the prime targets and why.

dailyNews.title: Trump Endorses Jake Paul, Who Isn't Running for Office
dailyNews.description: The president called Mr. Paul, a boxer and provocative influencer, a “great guy” and predicted that he would run for an elected position.

dailyNews.title: Trump Tempers María Corina Machado’s Political Ambitions in Venezuela
dailyNews.description: President Trump is tempering the political ambitions of María Corina Machado, a Nobel laureate, as he deepens ties with her foes in Venezuela.

dailyNews.title: White House mulls defunding civil rights election observer program
dailyNews.description: The federal observer program sends neutral observers to monitor election sites to ensure voters don't experience discrimination at the polls.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs Jones Act waiver amid rising fuel prices, White House says
dailyNews.description: Easing the century-old shipping law could help lower fuel prices as the Iran war pushes crude oil near $100 a barrel, experts say.

dailyNews.title: How Pentagon-Anthropic AI dispute escalated
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has blacklisted AI giant Anthropic, labeling it a supply chain risk. The company has sued in response. New York Times tech reporter Sheera Frenkel joins CBS News to break down the feud.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Michigan synagogue attack "a terrible thing"
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed the attack at a Michigan synagogue on Thursday, calling the incident "a terrible thing" and saying he was sending his love to the community.

dailyNews.title: White House compares deadly conflict to video games and movies in memeified videos
dailyNews.description: The White House’s video Friday began with a brief clip from the video game Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas.

dailyNews.title: Trump touted falling gas prices but now says 'we make a lot of money' as they go up
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says all the time that gas prices are dropping on his watch, but with the Iran war, he says rising oil costs are good for America.

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.
